scorza23: calls 75

scorza23: folds

Seat 4: scorza23 (2080 in chips, $1.76 bounty) 
scorza23: posts small blind 800
patraomkd: posts big blind 1600

scorza23: raises 480 to 2080 and is all-in
patraomkd: calls 320 and is all-in
Uncalled bet (160) returned to scorza23
*** FLOP *** [8h 3d 5h]
*** TURN *** [8h 3d 5h] [7s]
*** RIVER *** [8h 3d 5h 7s] [9c]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
patraomkd: shows [Qc Td] (high card Queen)
scorza23: shows [Kc Tc] (high card King)
scorza23 collected 3840 from pot
scorza23 wins $0.44 for eliminating patraomkd and their own bounty increases by $0.44 to $2.20
patraomkd finished the tournament in 2nd place
scorza23 wins the tournament - congratulations!
